args.sql: SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, lagretberegnetareal, ST_Area(omrade::geometry) AS area_from_geom_m2 FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '3301' AND (lagretberegnetareal > 5000 OR ST_Area(omrade::geometry) > 5000) ORDER BY COALESCE(lagretberegnetareal, ST_Area(omrade::geometry)) DESC LIMIT 10;
